global.description: The ad features a bold red background with prominent text and call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a new product collection with a limited-time offer.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A vibrant red background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: CrispBox
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top center, prominently displaying the brand name 'CrispBox' in a striking font.

elements.label: Product placeholder
elements.description: A rectangular placeholder in the center, suggesting a product image or app screenshot.

elements.label: Secondary placeholder
elements.description: Another rectangular placeholder below the main subject, possibly for additional product details.

elements.label: LE logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top right corner, featuring the letters 'LE' in a simple design.

elements.label: New collection drop
elements.description: Text in the center of the ad stating 'New collection drop Only this weekend' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Only this weekend

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A price tag at the bottom left displaying '€9.99' in a bold font, indicating the cost of the product.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center with the text 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, inviting user action.
